chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5650 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing on Misc. No.26251/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 26-03-2025 Mr. Talha Abbasi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Learned counsel states that the notice dated 16th November, 2023, available at page-19, is impugned herein. However, the same shall be contested before the issuing authority. Learned counsel seeks that the same may be adjudicated by the issuing authority vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and that in the meanwhile no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned A.A.G. states that the petitions may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms, however, subject to the caveat that the mining operations remain suspended in the effected areas and not be resuscitated by virtue of this order. Order accordingly. Petition is disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
